def positive_async_api_returns_plain_iterator_with_blocking_iteration():
    rule_id = "async_api_returns_plain_iterator_with_blocking_iteration"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag async-facing APIs that return plain iterators whose consumption can still block."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
